theorem candidate_T9_routeA (χ : G →* ℂˣ) : χ 1 = 1 := by
  have h_mul : χ 1 * χ 1 = χ 1 := by
    calc
      χ 1 * χ 1 = χ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
      _ = χ 1 := by simp
  have h_cancel : χ 1 = 1 := by
    exact mul_left_cancel₀ (a := χ 1) h_mul
  exact h_cancel

Location: ATP.temTH.CandidateTheorems.T9.RouteA:candidate_T9_routeA

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T9_routeA (χ : G →* ℂˣ) : χ 1 = 1 := by
  have h_mul : χ 1 * χ 1 = χ 1 := by
    calc
      χ 1 * χ 1 = χ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
      _ = χ 1 := by simp
  have h_cancel : (χ 1)⁻¹ * (χ 1 * χ 1) = (χ 1)⁻¹ * χ 1 := by
    exact congrArg (fun z => (χ 1)⁻¹ * z) h_mul
  calc
    χ 1 = 1 * χ 1 := by simp
    _ = ((χ 1)⁻¹ * χ 1) * χ 1 := by simp
    _ = (χ 1)⁻¹ * (χ 1 * χ 1) := by simp [mul_assoc]
    _ = (χ 1)⁻¹ * χ 1 := h_cancel
    _ = 1 := by simp
```
